metadata.description: Authentication and OAuth endpoints for World of Tanks Console API
metadata.note: These endpoints provide OAuth-based authentication for PlayStation Network and Xbox Live services

auth_login.description: Method authenticates user based on PlayStation Network ID which is used in World of Tanks PlayStation 4. To log in, player must enter PlayStation Network ID and password. Information on authorization status is sent to URL specified in redirect_uri parameter.

redirect_uri.description: URL where user is redirected after authentication. By default: api-modernarmor.worldoftanks.com/wotx//blank/

display.description: Layout for mobile applications. Valid values: 'page' — Page, 'popup' — Popup window, 'touch' — Mobile view

expires_at.description: Access_token expiration time in UNIX. Delta can also be specified in seconds. Expiration time and delta must not exceed two weeks from the current time.

language.description: Authentication form localization language. Valid values: cs, de, en, es, es-ar, fr, ja, pl, pt-br, ru, th, tr, vi, zh-tw, zh-cn

nofollow.description: If parameter nofollow=1 is passed in, the user is not redirected. URL is returned in response. Default is 0. Min value is 0. Maximum value: 1.

auth_prolongate.description: Method generates new access_token based on the current token. This method is used when the player is still using the application but the current access_token is about to expire.

access_token.description: Access token for the private data of a user's account; can be received via the authorization method; valid within a stated time period

expires_at.description: Access_token expiration time in UNIX. Delta can also be specified in seconds. Expiration time and delta must not exceed two weeks from the current time.

auth_logout.description: Method to invalidate the current access token and log out the user from the application.

access_token.description: Access token for the private data of a user's account; can be received via the authorization method; valid within a stated time period
